arts.ttl: Full Manchester United squad available to Ruben Amorim vs Newcastle as two big decisions to be made
arts.sum: The latest Man United news as the Reds host Newcastle on Monday night with Ruben Amorim seeking a response from his struggling team

arts.ttl: 'I single-handedly denied Man Utd the title – I’ll never get bored of talking about it'
arts.sum: Ludek Miklosko was in inspired form for West Ham on the final day of the 1994/95 Premier League season, as the Hammers held Man Utd to a 1-1 draw to deny the Red Devils a third consecutive title

arts.ttl: Journalist claims Newcastle may have to “lose a big star” in 2025
arts.sum: Anthony Gordon, Bruno Guimaraes, and Alexander Isak have been linked with a move away from Newcastle United in recent months. All three players have been exceptional for Newcastle since joining the club and naturally, top clubs are keen on securing their signatures. It will be interesting to see if Newcastle are forced to consider selling […] The post Journalist claims Newcastle may have to “lose a big star” in 2025 appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Wait and see – Ruben Amorim leaves door open for Harry Maguire to take armband
arts.sum: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes is suspended against Newcastle.

arts.ttl: Ratcliffe draws fan wrath as Man Utd 'costs purge' hits charity foundation
arts.sum: Now, Sky News reports that Ratcliffe and company are set to inform Man Utd's charitable arm, the Manchester United Foundation, that its funding will also be cut. Manchester United are set to slash their funding of the club's charitable arm, the Manchester United Foundation, according to a report.

arts.ttl: Anthony Gordon shuts down doubters in explosive must-read vow on Newcastle United future
arts.sum: Anthony Gordon has slammed talk that he could be tempted to swap Newcastle United for Liverpool - or anybody else in the Premier League. People keep talking about the project from the outside because of how much the club has come on but that doesn't really mean much to us.

arts.ttl: Man Utd charity funding set to be 'axed' by Sir Jim Ratcliffe
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe's cost-cutting regime is now targeting Manchester United's charitable arm.

arts.ttl: 'CRAZY' Osimhen plan revealed as Man Utd surge into pole position
arts.sum: Manchester United are the European giants most active in the pursuit of Victor Osimhen, but Galatasaray have hatched a 'crazy plan' to sign the on-loan striker permanently, according to Turkish media. Chelsea, Man Utd and PSG are just some of the clubs that have been linked with Osimhen in recent months, while Galatasaray dream of making his stay permanent.

arts.ttl: Maguire: Amorim 'total opposite' to Ten Hag
arts.sum: Manchester United defender Harry Maguire has said Ruben Amorim's style is the 'total opposite' to former boss Erik Ten Hag's.

arts.ttl: Man Utd to slash funding to its own charity in Jim Ratcliffe's latest controversial cost purge
arts.sum: The Manchester United Foundation is set to see its funding from the club slashed in the latest brutal cost-cutting measure from controlling co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe's egime
